message:
refactor(test): consolidate NDJSON match arms, re-export test utilities, fix clippy lints

Clean up test infrastructure code and suppress false-positive lints.

- Consolidate duplicate TestEvent match arms in test_ndjson.rs
  (WakerClone/WakerDrop merged with ReactorDeregister;
  TimerScheduled/TimerFired merged with WakerWake)
- Replace unwrap_or_else with map_or_else and use std::io::Error::other
  instead of Error::new(ErrorKind::Other, e)
- Add #[allow(clippy::too_many_lines)] where appropriate
- Re-export NDJSON test utilities from test_utils.rs
- Add #[allow(clippy::double_must_use)] to obligation reserve methods

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
